---
title: "Mediaite writing analysis — technical report"
---

This Quarto book summarizes a structured review of writing-style change at Mediaite.com. It combines stylometric features, embedding-space drift, statistical tests, and natural-author comparisons. Chapters build from data collection through methods, quantitative results, and the executive summary.

Open **chapter 1** for design and power context, or **the full report chapter** for the consolidated summary and provenance table.
